name: Self-Taught Wild Animal
details: Everything is self-taught as the animal lived in the wild with no help or assistance. Skills: Basic Academics at -5%, Wilderness Survival +25%, Prowl +25%, Escape Artist +10%, Climbing +15%, Swimming +10%. May pick 1 Amateur skill. Gains Feral Combat Training, +10 SDC, +2 ME, +4 PE, +2 PP, and +2 PS. Equipment: scavenged 3D6x$100 in various items, most in poor condition.

name: Fringe-Society Education
details: By skulking around the fringes of society, the mutant picked up a rudimentary education. Gains Basic Combat Training, Prowl +15%, Climbing +15%. Amateur Skills: select 12. Special bonus: +2 PP, +2 MA, and +10% to all Perception checks. Equipment: scavenged 3D6x$250 in standard items.

name: Mentored Special Training
details: Adopted by a mentor who teaches and guides the mutant in special training. Gains Ninjutsu, Martial Arts, or Assassin Combat Training, plus 3 Ancient Weapon Proficiencies of choice. Professional Skills: select 3 Military or Espionage skills with no Education bonus, plus Acrobatics, Climbing, and Prowl. Amateur Skills: select 10 at +5%. Equipment: scavenged and hand-made 3D6x$100 in equipment.

name: University Education
details: The mutant went public and was educated at a major university. Professional Skills: select 12 at +20% Education bonus. Amateur Skills: select 6. Equipment: collected 2D6x$500 of standard equipment.
